title: stelis repens
intro: Stelis repens, also known as the creeping stelis, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis repens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a sought-after ingredient in traditional medicine. Stelis repens is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
